LightningComponentBundle.description: A reusable modal dialog component for confirming delete actions with Cancel and Delete buttons. Implements SLDS 2 patterns with full accessibility support.

property.name: title
property.label: Modal Title
property.description: The heading text displayed in the modal header

property.name: message
property.label: Confirmation Message
property.description: The main message displayed in the modal body
property.default: Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.

property.name: deleteLabel
property.label: Delete Button Label
property.description: The text displayed on the delete button

property.name: cancelLabel
property.label: Cancel Button Label
property.description: The text displayed on the cancel button

property.name: show
property.label: Show Modal
property.description: Controls whether the modal is visible
